item_1.imageAlt: Two females in working in lab
item_1.name: Hero Container Item
Text Container Text
item_1.text: We have the potential to solve the most profound mysteries of science. Help discover medicines that address the health challenges of today and tomorrow.

block_1781747752600.name: Custom Title
block_1781747752600.title: Help advance scientific research while transforming your career

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text: If you’re ready to contribute to new scientific advancements, explore our careers in clinical research. Together, we can bridge the gap between groundbreaking research and patient care.

block_1781747767203.linkText: VIEW CLINICAL RESEARCH ROLES IN R&D
block_1781747767203.name: Cta

block_1781747776950.linkText: EXPLORE ABBVIE’S APPROACH TO CLINICAL RESEARCH
block_1781747776950.name: Cta

linklist_item_810310425.linkText: Medical Writers (All Therapeutic Areas) in Medical Affairs
linklist_item_810310425.name: LinkList Item

linklist_item_810310.linkText: R&D Device Engineer – Mechanical, Electrical, or Software Engineer
linklist_item_810310.name: LinkList Item

linklist_item_810310_617357573.linkText: R&D Device Engineer – Mechanical, Electrical, or Software Engineer
linklist_item_810310_617357573.name: LinkList Item

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Join our Talent Community to receive information about opportunities that are tailored to your interests.

teaser.description: As a part of AbbVie's R&D team, you’ll have the opportunity to work alongside leading scientists to develop medicine and solutions that have the potential to impact many lives.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Going beyond "good enough"

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: R&D works to make a difference in the following areas:

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
• Aesthetics R&D
  • Asset Leadership
  • Chemistry, Manufacturing & Controls (CMC)
  • Clinical Pharmacology
  • Data & Statistical Sciences (DSS)
  • Development Sciences
  • Discovery Research

text_container_text_280613837.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_280613837.text:
• Global Medical Affairs
  • Health Economics Outcomes Research
  • Therapeutic Development
  • Pharmacovigilance & Patient Safety
  • Quality Assurance
  • Regulatory Operations, Policy & Intelligence
  • R&D Operations

block.attributionRole: VP, Head of Global Medicinal Chemistry
block.name: Quote
block.quotation: We work together across multiple functional areas with teams of scientists to actually discover and then develop these new therapies. And it’s a thrill when you can do that as a team.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Big steps in neurological care require big bets on science

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: If you’re ready to contribute to new scientific advancements, explore our careers in clinical research. Together, we can bridge the gap between groundbreaking research and patient care.

cta.linkText: Learn more about our approach to Neuroscience
cta.name: Cta
